results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Earthquake day 16, toll 3,899 (up from 3,535). Re-check outcome: evidenced response-failure move remains ~-2.7, does NOT cross the 5-pt threshold; strong downward watch sustained.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Worst northern hunger in nearly a decade (17M+ Crisis+); continuation of the already-priced Jun-19 band-crossing famine crisis; sub-threshold.

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Ethnic Unity Law consolidation continues; discrete self-immolation trigger not repeated this cycle; Claude Code 'backdoor' warning is external; sub-threshold.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Balochistan enforced-disappearances continue (bodies recovered, signs of torture); reinforces existing EQU/ACC deficits; continuation, sub-threshold.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Ceasefire unstable; dominant harm is IDF/Hezbollah conflict (scored against Israel / non-state), not Lebanese-state own conduct; sub-threshold.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: Civil-war death toll passes 100,000 (junta responsible for ~71% of civilian deaths, own-conduct atrocity); floor (0.0) sustained. rotation-state rank corrected 191->186.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Hidden Claude Code steganographic tracker (removed) is a real INT/ACC transparency/values ding, but a single remediated experiment: max defensible move ~-1.3 (sub-threshold, no band line). Confirm at 59.1, boundary-watch 0.9pt below Established.

results.name: Meta Platforms
results.key_finding: PUBLISHED BASELINE CORRECTION: Meta is published at 7.8 (Critical, rank 446), NOT 60 as the directive stated. $1.4T penalty demand is a litigation max-figure, not new conduct; underlying youth-safety litigation already priced into 7.8; sub-threshold.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: UN inquiry finds RSF mass killings/gang rapes amount to genocide (Jul 9) — gravest characterization yet; floor (0.0) sustained, cannot move lower. Finding documented as floor-sustaining.

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: Ebola toll hits 600 (fastest-growing outbreak on record); pathogen-driven, not state-inflicted. Weak 82%-vs-95% contact follow-up consistent with near-floor response profile; no new own-conduct step-change; near-floor confirmed.

results.name: Uganda
results.key_finding: New Marburg outbreak + ongoing Ebola are pathogen-driven; prompt WHO notification is neutral-to-mildly-positive own-response conduct, not a deterioration. Confirm at published 20.3. rotation-state drift corrected 15.3->20.3 (Developing/144) to mirror published index.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: JNIM/FLA offensive renewed after two-month lull; principally non-state harm. Uniform-1.5 baseline never re-derived against atrocity findings; calibration flag carried forward for coordinator (flag-for-review, not resolved). Sub-threshold.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Settlement expansion (13 new settlements, Jul 6) + settler-violence escalation reinforce floor; floor (0.0) sustained, cannot move lower.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: Houthi detention of 73 UN/civil-society staff continues (own-conduct harm by de facto authority); floor (0.0) sustained.

results.name: Haiti
results.key_finding: US TPS work-auth deadline (Jul 10) is a US-attributable signal, not Haiti own conduct. Haiti near-floor 4.7 rests on state collapse (~90% of capital gang-controlled); near-floor confirmed.

rotation_state_corrections: uganda: rotation-state 15.3/critical/141 corrected to published 20.3/developing/144 (unapplied-value drift; El Salvador/Mali-class bug)
myanmar: rotation-state rank 191 corrected to published 186 (composite/band already matched at 0/critical)
calibration_flags_documented: mali-burkina-faso-cross-peer (open, coordinator-level; Mali uniform-1.5 baseline never re-derived against atrocity findings; recommend flag-for-review, do not resolve unilaterally)

notes.meta_baseline_discrepancy: Cycle directive stated Meta 'published 60' at the 60.0 boundary. Actual published score is 7.8 (Critical, rank 446), verified in fortune-500.json, the Meta entity-record, and rotation-state. Assessment conducted against the true 7.8 baseline. The '60' figure appears to be a directive error.
notes.anthropic_boundary: Anthropic remains 0.9pt below the Established 60.0 line. The Claude Code tracker episode is genuine but sub-threshold (max defensible -1.3); confirm at 59.1, downward watch. Conversion trigger: a second undisclosed telemetry episode or a regulator/court deceptive-practice finding.
